chunks.text: Soda Hall Power Shutdown, Wed. 11/29 2AM | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Soda Hall Power Shutdown, Wed. 11/29 2AM There will be a power shutdown for Soda Hall on the early morning of Wednesday, November

Hall on the early morning of Wednesday, November 29th, scheduled for 2 to 6 AM. The shutdown and short notice are due to an urgent need for the campus high voltage team to complete repairs from line damage in June. It is also possible that the outag

damage in June. It is also possible that the outage could be extended if difficult circumstances are encountered. We have arranged with campus facilities to receive generator power for 288 and 290 Soda so that we can continue to provide IT services t

a so that we can continue to provide IT services to the outside world while Soda is dark. As such, no interruptions to IRIS services outside Soda Hall are expected at this time. However, due to many electrical load variables it is possible that we ma

lectrical load variables it is possible that we may need to shut down some services without notice during the maintenance window. Power to research server rooms 420A and 287 will be lost and the sysadmins of those rooms are coordinating a full system

mins of those rooms are coordinating a full system shutdown. For sysadmins of machines in 340 Soda, you will also need to shut down your machines. We recommend doing so before midnight. UPDATE [2017-11-29 02:50:01 | Derek Calderon] This maintenance w

1-29 02:50:01 | Derek Calderon] This maintenance was cancelled at the last minute due to a failure of our server room UPS, which introduced unacceptable risk and prevented the project from going forward as planned. We will need to re-schedule the wor

rd as planned. We will need to re-schedule the work with campus facilities and high voltage for some time after the new year. Resolved as of 2017-11-29 02:46:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenan
